arts.ttl: 'Superb': Chelsea legend John Terry was left really impressed by one Arsenal player last night
Arsenal stars nominated for Fans' Footballer of the Year 2024 award
arts.sum: Last season culminated in another second-placed finish for Mikel Arteta’s side, as rivals Manchester City pipped them at the final hurdle to win a record fourth consecutive Premier League title. He had a genuine shout to be Premier League player of the year last season, and is arguably the most influential player in this Gunners squad.

arts.ttl: 'That's s***' - Gary Neville gives verdict on Man Utd moment that proved Arsenal difference
arts.sum: Manchester United conceded twice from corners in their Premier League defeat at Arsenal and their former skipper Gary Neville delivered a damning real-time reaction

arts.ttl: 'No matter' - Ruben Amorim makes promise to Luke Shaw after latest Man United injury nightmare
arts.sum: Luke Shaw has picked up a hamstring injury for Man Utd and is set for another period of the sidelines as his injury hell continues.

arts.ttl: Arsenal begin talks over Cunha - Thursday's gossip
arts.sum: Arsenal begin talks over a move for Matheus Cunha, Julen Lopetegui's West Ham future is in the balance, while Harry Maguire is attracting Premier League interest.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Could Sign 'Dream' £240,000-a-Week Luke Shaw Upgrade
arts.sum: Manchester United have lost Luke Shaw to injury yet again - and Ruben Amorim should make a huge move for a world-class star to end any uncertainty

arts.ttl: Man Utd careers OVER? Arsenal show Amorim where signings are required
arts.sum: The organisation his team showed in nullifying the Gunners in the first half will have given Amorim some hope that this is a group that can be moulded into something more, yet the lack of offensive quality that Man Utd The defeat to Arsenal was, instead, instructive in terms of what Amorim has learned about his squad.

arts.ttl: 'Can feel it': Ruben Amorim shares what he noticed about Arsenal just before half-time last night
arts.sum: Arsenal handed Ruben Amorim his first defeat as Manchester United’s manager. The Gunners went into the game as the favourites to pick up all three...

arts.ttl: How Arsenal's Declan Rice reacted after hearing Liverpool dropped points last night
arts.sum: A great night for the Gunners! 🤩

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Arsenal set-pieces, catching Liverpool and Gabriel injury
arts.sum: If we perform the way we're performing right now, we're going to win a lot of games. The team really has that belief that from every angle we have the mentality to threaten the opponent and try to score.
